description_long: This object is a tall, cylindrical lotion container with a pastel color scheme dominated by mint green, pink, and white. The surface is covered with whimsical text, including product information, fun facts, and branding, most notably the large 'AriZona' logo. The graphics include geometric fish-like patterns and bubble motifs, giving the packaging a playful and modern appearance. The top of the cylinder features a flat, metallic-looking cap with a subtle seam, suggesting it is a screw-on type. Nutritional facts and other product details are printed in small text on one side. The container appears to be made primarily of coated cardboard or composite material, with a metal or plastic cap.
description: A tall, cylindrical lotion container with pastel graphics, playful text, and a metallic screw-on cap.
description_view_0: Front view showing whimsical text, the 'AriZona' logo, and bubble graphics in pink and mint green.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting geometric fish-like patterns and a mostly uninterrupted pastel background.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying nutritional facts, barcode, and more geometric patterns with less text.
description_view_3: Angled view with the 'AriZona' logo prominently displayed and additional playful text.
